ticket.subject: Cannot access account after password change
ticket.description: I changed my password yesterday and now I cannot login. The system says my credentials are invalid even though I just reset them.

ticket.subject: Critical bug in payment processing
ticket.description: Payments are failing for all users. This is production down and affecting our revenue. We need an emergency fix immediately.

ticket.subject: Invoice shows wrong amount
ticket.description: My latest invoice shows an incorrect amount. I was billed $200 but should have been billed $100 per our subscription agreement.

ticket.subject: Feature request: multi-language support
ticket.description: We would love to have multi-language support for our international users. This enhancement would help us expand to new markets.

ticket.subject: Data export shows incorrect results
ticket.description: Steps to reproduce: 1) Go to reports 2) Export to CSV 3) Open file. Expected: current data. Actual: data from 3 months ago. This is a regression.

ticket.subject: 2FA authentication not working
ticket.description: My two-factor authentication stopped working after the last update. I cannot log in without 2FA which means I am completely locked out.

ticket.subject: Slow loading dashboard
ticket.description: The dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load. This performance issue is severely impacting our team's productivity.

ticket.subject: Suggestion: add keyboard shortcuts
ticket.description: Adding keyboard shortcuts would be a nice enhancement. When you get a chance it would be great to have this improvement in the UI.

ticket.subject: Unexpected logout every 5 minutes
ticket.description: I keep getting logged out unexpectedly about every 5 minutes. This bug makes the application unusable. It always fails without any warning.

ticket.subject: Request refund for annual subscription
ticket.description: I accidentally purchased an annual subscription instead of monthly. I need to cancel and get a refund for the difference immediately.

ticket.subject: API returns 502 bad gateway
ticket.description: Our integration is getting 502 bad gateway errors from your API. This is blocking all our automated processes. The error started 2 hours ago.

ticket.subject: Add role-based access control
ticket.description: We need role-based access control for our team. This is an important feature for our enterprise security requirements and compliance.

ticket.subject: Wrong currency displayed in billing
ticket.description: My billing page is showing amounts in USD but I should be billed in EUR. This incorrect behavior has been happening since last month.

ticket.subject: Defect in search functionality
ticket.description: The search feature does not return results consistently. Sometimes it works and sometimes it returns nothing. Inconsistent behavior observed across multiple browsers.

ticket.subject: General question about data retention
ticket.description: I have a general question about your data retention policies. How long is customer data kept and what is the deletion process?

ticket.subject: Login page down for all users
ticket.description: The login page is completely down. None of our users can access the application. This is a production outage affecting all customers.

ticket.subject: Integration with Slack requested
ticket.description: We would love to have a Slack integration so our team gets notifications. This would be a great enhancement that many users have requested.

ticket.subject: Account suspended without notice
ticket.description: My account was suspended without any prior notice or explanation. I cannot access any of my data. This is blocking my entire workflow.

ticket.subject: Export to PDF is broken
ticket.description: The PDF export feature stopped working after the last deployment. Steps to reproduce: click export, select PDF, click download. The download never starts.

ticket.subject: Billing portal shows blank page
ticket.description: When I try to access the billing portal I see a completely blank page. I cannot view my invoices or payment history. This has been happening for a week.

ticket.subject: Minor typo in error message
ticket.description: There is a minor typo in the error message shown when login fails. It says 'invaild' instead of 'invalid'. This is purely a cosmetic fix, no rush.

ticket.subject: Forgot password email not delivered
ticket.description: I requested a password reset email multiple times but never received it. I checked spam. I cannot access my account without resetting my password.

ticket.subject: Database connection errors in logs
ticket.description: Our monitoring shows database connection errors in the application logs. This is causing intermittent failures for our users and needs urgent investigation.

ticket.subject: Request for advanced analytics
ticket.description: We would love to have more advanced analytics features. Custom date ranges and filtering would be a great improvement for our reporting needs.

ticket.subject: Incorrect item count on dashboard
ticket.description: The dashboard shows 150 items but I only have 50. Wrong result is shown every time. I have reproduced this on three different browsers.

ticket.subject: Subscription plan upgrade billing issue
ticket.description: I upgraded my plan but was charged the old price. The billing did not reflect the new subscription tier. I need this corrected and a proper invoice issued.

ticket.subject: Feedback on onboarding experience
ticket.description: I wanted to share some general feedback about the onboarding experience. The setup wizard was confusing. Some documentation improvements would help new users.

ticket.subject: Email notifications not sending
ticket.description: I am not receiving any email notifications even though they are enabled in settings. I have missed several important alerts because of this bug.

ticket.subject: Request: mobile app for Android
ticket.description: Many of our users have requested an Android mobile app. Having a native mobile app would be a great enhancement to the platform experience.

ticket.subject: Account locked after too many login attempts
ticket.description: My account got locked after entering the wrong password a few times. I know the correct password now but cannot unlock the account myself. Please help.
